name: che-word-mcp
description: Word MCP Server - Swift 原生 OOXML 操作，233 個工具。v3.13.6 bump ooxml-swift v0.19.5→v0.19.6 + word-to-md-swift v0.6.0→v0.6.1 — closes #58 (sub-stack A of #58/#59/#60 document-content-preservation): body-level <w:bookmarkStart>/<w:bookmarkEnd>（TOC _Toc<digits> 多段落跨段錨點）現在能在 body-mutating save 後完整保留。架構原則「if not typed, preserve as raw」— BodyChild enum 擴增 .bookmarkMarker（typed）+ .rawBlockElement（generic catch-all）。Cross-cutting matrix-pin testDocumentContentEqualityInvariant 加入 bookmarkStart count parity（45=45 thesis fixture）。B（v3.13.7 / #59 whitespace overlay）+ C（v3.14.0 / #60 RunProperties audit）後續發布。v3.13.5 R5 stack-completion（30 findings closed across rounds 4-8 6-AI verify）。基於 ooxml-swift v0.19.6 + word-to-md-swift v0.6.1。
